nodes.name: Square-tailed saw-wing
nodes.summary: Square-tailed saw-wing（Psalidoprocne nitens）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Square-tailed saw-wing。

nodes.name: Psalidoprocne
nodes.summary: Psalidoprocne（Psalidoprocne）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联5种鸟类，如Square-tailed saw-wing、Mountain saw-wing、White-headed saw-wing等5种鸟类。

nodes.name: Square-tailed saw-wing
nodes.summary: The square-tailed saw-wing (Psalidoprocne nitens), also known as the square-tailed rough-winged swallow is a species of bird in the family Hirundinidae. It is native to the African tropical rainforest. Description It is dark green, almost black. Subspecies There are currently two recognised subspecies. P. n. nitens, the nominate subspecies, which occurs in Guinea, Sierra Leone, Ivory Coast, Ghana, Togo, Nigeria, Gabon, Congo and Angola. P. n. centralis, which occurs in northeast Democratic Republic of the Congo. References
